name: Agent Overview & Detail Pages
description: Agent list page showing all agents from openclaw.json: name, status indicator (active/idle/error), current session info, assigned tasks (joined from SQLite), cumulative token usage. Agent detail page with session history, token usage over time chart (recharts line chart), assigned tasks list, and activity feed filtered to this agent. Handles missing/malformed openclaw.json with error state UI (AC2). All data fetched via lib/data/ layer. Layered architecture: Domain Types → Zod Schemas → Data Access → API Responses → Component Props → SSE Events.

types.name: AgentId
types.description: Branded string type for agent identifiers. Runtime: string. Compile-time: branded via `string & { readonly __brand: 'AgentId' }`. Must be non-empty, lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens only.

types.name: AgentStatusKind
types.description: Discriminant for the AgentStatus union. Determines which contextual fields are present.

types.name: AgentStatusActive

fields.name: current_session_id
fields.description: ID of the currently running session.

fields.name: started_at
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when current session started.

fields.name: current_task_description
fields.description: Human-readable description of what the agent is currently working on.

types.description: Status payload when agent is actively running a session.

types.name: AgentStatusIdle

fields.name: last_active_at
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last activity. Empty string if never active.

types.description: Status payload when agent is idle (not running).

types.name: AgentStatusError
types.description: Status payload when agent is in an error state.

types.name: AgentStatus
types.description: Discriminated union of agent status variants. Discriminant field: 'kind'.

types.name: TokenUsageSummary

fields.name: total_input_tokens
fields.description: Total prompt/input tokens consumed across all sessions.

fields.name: total_output_tokens
fields.description: Total completion/output tokens consumed across all sessions.

fields.name: estimated_cost_usd
fields.description: Estimated cumulative cost in USD based on model pricing.

fields.name: session_count
fields.description: Number of sessions contributing to this summary.

types.description: Cumulative token usage counters for an agent.

types.name: Agent

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current agent status as discriminated union.

fields.name: assigned_task_count
fields.description: Number of tasks currently assigned to this agent (from SQLite).

types.description: Summary representation of an agent for the list page. Composed from openclaw.json (name, model, status) joined with SQLite (tasks, tokens).

types.name: AgentSession

fields.name: ended_at
fields.description: ISO 8601 end timestamp. Empty string if session is still active.

fields.name: duration_seconds
fields.description: Session duration in seconds. 0 if still active.

fields.name: input_tokens
fields.description: Input tokens consumed in this session.

fields.name: output_tokens
fields.description: Output tokens consumed in this session.

fields.name: cost_usd
fields.description: Estimated cost for this session in USD.

types.description: A single agent work session with timing and token data.

types.name: SessionExitStatus
types.description: How an agent session terminated.

types.name: AgentTask

fields.name: completed_at
fields.description: ISO 8601 completion timestamp. Empty if not completed.

types.description: A task assigned to an agent, stored in SQLite.

types.name: TaskStatus
types.description: Task lifecycle status.

types.name: TaskPriority
types.description: Task priority levels.

types.name: TokenUsageDataPoint

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp representing the start of the time bucket.

fields.name: input_tokens
fields.description: Input tokens consumed in this bucket.

fields.name: output_tokens
fields.description: Output tokens consumed in this bucket.

fields.name: session_count
fields.description: Number of sessions in this bucket.

types.description: A single data point for the recharts token usage line chart. Keyed by time bucket.

types.name: AgentDetail

fields.name: recent_sessions
fields.description: Most recent sessions for this agent, ordered newest-first.

fields.name: assigned_tasks
fields.description: Tasks currently assigned to this agent.

fields.name: token_usage_timeline
fields.description: Time-series token usage data for chart rendering.

types.description: Full agent detail for the detail page. Extends Agent with session history, tasks, and chart data.

types.name: TimeRange
types.description: Predefined time range for filtering token usage data.

types.name: PaginationParams

validators.error_message: Page size must be between 1 and 100

types.description: Pagination parameters for list queries.

types.name: PaginatedResult

fields.name: items
fields.description: The items for the current page.

fields.name: total_count
fields.description: Total number of items across all pages.

fields.name: has_next
fields.description: Whether there is a next page.

fields.name: has_previous
fields.description: Whether there is a previous page.

types.description: Generic paginated result wrapper.

types.name: DataErrorKind
types.description: Discriminant for DataError union. Categorizes data access failures.

types.name: DataError

fields.name: source_path
fields.description: File path or DB table that caused the error.

fields.name: details
fields.description: Additional structured error context (e.g., Zod issues, SQL error code).

types.description: Structured error type returned from data access layer. Part of Result<T, DataError> pattern.

types.name: ResultOk

validators.error_message: ok must be true for success result

fields.name: data
fields.description: The success payload. Actual type depends on the function returning this Result.

types.description: Success variant of Result<T, DataError>.

types.name: ResultErr

validators.error_message: ok must be false for error result

types.description: Error variant of Result<T, DataError>.

types.name: Result
types.description: Discriminated union for fallible data access operations. Discriminant: 'ok'. Replaces thrown exceptions with explicit error handling.

types.name: AgentRawConfig

validators.error_message: Agent ID must be lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens

fields.name: status
fields.description: Raw status string from config. Mapped to AgentStatus union.

fields.name: current_session
fields.description: Raw current session data if active. May be null/missing.

fields.name: error
fields.description: Raw error data if status is error.

types.description: Raw agent entry as parsed from openclaw.json before domain mapping. Validated via Zod AgentRawSchema.

types.name: OpenClawConfig
types.description: Top-level openclaw.json structure. Validated via Zod OpenClawConfigSchema.

types.name: AgentListResponse

fields.name: fetched_at
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when data was fetched. Used for cache invalidation.

types.description: API response shape for GET /api/agents. Wire format.

types.name: AgentDetailResponse

fields.name: fetched_at
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when data was fetched.

types.description: API response shape for GET /api/agents/[agentId]. Wire format.

types.name: AgentErrorResponse

validators.error_message: Error status code must be 4xx or 5xx

types.description: API error response shape for agent endpoints.

types.name: AgentCardProps
types.description: Props for the AgentCard component displayed in the agent list. Server component.

types.name: AgentStatusBadgeProps

fields.name: status
fields.description: Agent status to render as badge.

validators.error_message: Size must be sm, md, or lg

types.description: Props for the AgentStatusBadge component. Client component for animated indicators.

types.name: TokenUsageChartProps

fields.name: data
fields.description: Time-series data points for the chart.

fields.name: time_range
fields.description: Currently selected time range for display.

fields.name: on_time_range_change
fields.description: Callback function name/ref for time range changes. Typed as (range: TimeRange) => void at runtime.

validators.error_message: Chart height must be between 100 and 800 pixels

fields.name: show_cost_axis
fields.description: Whether to show the secondary cost USD axis.

types.description: Props for the TokenUsageChart recharts LineChart component. Client component ('use client').

types.name: AgentActivityFeedProps

fields.name: agent_id
fields.description: Agent to filter activity events for.

fields.name: max_visible
fields.description: Max events to display before scrolling.

types.description: Props for the AgentActivityFeed component. Client component for SSE-driven live updates.

types.name: AgentActivityEvent
types.description: A single activity event for the agent activity feed.

types.name: AgentSessionListProps
types.description: Props for the AgentSessionList component on the detail page.

types.name: AgentTaskListProps
types.description: Props for the AgentTaskList component on the detail page.

types.name: SSEAgentStatusChanged
types.description: SSE event: agent:status-changed. Emitted when an agent's status transitions.

types.name: SSEAgentSessionStarted

fields.name: task_description
fields.description: What the session is working on.

types.description: SSE event: agent:session-started. Emitted when a new agent session begins.

types.name: SSEAgentSessionEnded

fields.name: token_usage
fields.description: Token usage for the ended session.

types.description: SSE event: agent:session-ended. Emitted when an agent session completes or fails.

types.name: SSEAgentEvent
types.description: Discriminated union of all agent-related SSE events. Discriminant field: 'type'. These are namespaced members of the broader SSE event bus.

types.name: AgentListErrorStateProps

fields.name: error_kind
fields.description: The kind of error that occurred.

fields.name: config_path
fields.description: The path that was attempted for openclaw.json.

fields.name: on_retry
fields.description: Callback ref for retry action. Typed as () => void at runtime.

types.description: Props for the error state UI shown when openclaw.json is missing or malformed (AC2).

functions.name: parseOpenClawConfig
functions.description: Parse and validate openclaw.json from the filesystem using Zod OpenClawConfigSchema.safeParse(). Returns the parsed config or a structured DataError. Located in lib/openclaw/schemas.ts.

inputs.name: config_path
inputs.description: Absolute filesystem path to openclaw.json.

error_cases.name: file_not_found
error_cases.condition: openclaw.json does not exist at config_path

error_cases.name: file_read_error
error_cases.condition: File exists but cannot be read (permissions, IO error)

error_cases.name: invalid_json
error_cases.condition: File content is not valid JSON

error_cases.name: schema_validation_failed
error_cases.condition: JSON is valid but does not match OpenClawConfigSchema

preconditions: config_path is an absolute filesystem path
postconditions: On success (ok=true), data is a valid OpenClawConfig
On file_not_found error, source_path matches config_path
On file_parse_error, details contains Zod validation issues
Never throws — all errors are returned as ResultErr

structured_side_effects.description: Reads and parses the OpenClaw configuration file using fs/promises.readFile()

performance_budget.complexity: O(n) where n = number of agents in config

functions.name: mapRawAgentToDomain
functions.description: Transform a raw AgentRawConfig (from Zod parse) into the domain Agent type. Maps raw status strings to the AgentStatus discriminated union. Pure function in lib/openclaw/schemas.ts.

inputs.name: raw
inputs.description: Raw agent config from Zod parse.

inputs.name: token_usage
inputs.description: Pre-fetched token usage summary for this agent.

inputs.name: assigned_task_count
inputs.description: Pre-fetched count of assigned tasks from SQLite.

preconditions: raw has passed Zod schema validation
postconditions: Returned Agent.id is a branded AgentId equal to raw.id
Agent.status.kind matches raw.status (mapped to valid AgentStatusKind)
Agent.token_usage === token_usage parameter
Agent.assigned_task_count === assigned_task_count parameter

functions.name: getAgents
functions.description: Fetch all agents from openclaw.json, join with SQLite for task counts and token usage. Returns the full agent list. Located in lib/data/agents.ts.

error_cases.name: db_error
error_cases.condition: SQLite query for tasks or token usage fails

preconditions: OpenClaw config path is configured in environment or lib/openclaw/config
postconditions: On success, data is list of Agent objects sorted by name alphabetically
Each Agent has accurate assigned_task_count from SQLite
Each Agent has accurate token_usage from session data
On file_not_found or parse error, returns ResultErr (never throws)

structured_side_effects.description: Reads agent config from filesystem via parseOpenClawConfig
Reads session directories for token usage aggregation
Reads task assignments from SQLite via better-sqlite3 (read-only query)

performance_budget.complexity: O(a * (s + t)) where a = agents, s = sessions per agent, t = tasks per agent

functions.name: getAgentById
functions.description: Fetch a single agent by ID. Returns Agent summary or agent_not_found error. Located in lib/data/agents.ts.

inputs.name: agent_id
inputs.description: The agent identifier to look up.

validators.error_message: Agent ID must be lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens

error_cases.name: agent_not_found
error_cases.condition: No agent with the given ID exists in openclaw.json

preconditions: agent_id is a valid non-empty branded AgentId string
postconditions: On success, data is a single Agent matching the requested ID
On agent_not_found, error message includes the requested agent_id

structured_side_effects.description: Reads agent config from filesystem
Reads task count and token usage from SQLite (read-only query)

performance_budget.complexity: O(a) where a = total agents (linear scan of config)

functions.name: getAgentSessions
functions.description: Fetch paginated session history for a specific agent. Reads session data from OpenClaw session files. Located in lib/data/agents.ts.

inputs.name: agent_id
inputs.description: Agent to fetch sessions for.

validators.error_message: Agent ID must be lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens

inputs.name: pagination
inputs.description: Pagination parameters.

error_cases.name: agent_not_found
error_cases.condition: No agent with the given ID exists

error_cases.name: session_parse_error
error_cases.condition: One or more session files are malformed (skipped gracefully, logged)

preconditions: agent_id is a valid non-empty branded AgentId string
postconditions: On success, data is PaginatedResult with items of type AgentSession
Sessions are ordered by started_at descending (newest first)
total_count reflects all sessions for this agent, not just current page
has_next is true iff (page * page_size) < total_count

structured_side_effects.description: Reads session JSON files from the agent's session directory
Logs warnings for malformed session files that are skipped

performance_budget.complexity: O(s log s) where s = total sessions for sorting, plus O(page_size) for page extraction

functions.name: getAgentTokenUsage
functions.description: Fetch time-bucketed token usage data for an agent over a time range. Returns recharts-ready data points. Located in lib/data/agents.ts.

inputs.name: agent_id
inputs.description: Agent to fetch token usage for.

validators.error_message: Agent ID must be lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens

inputs.name: time_range
inputs.description: Time range to aggregate over.

error_cases.name: agent_not_found
error_cases.condition: No agent with the given ID exists

error_cases.name: session_data_error
error_cases.condition: Cannot read or parse session data for token aggregation

preconditions: agent_id is a valid non-empty branded AgentId string
time_range is a valid TimeRange variant
postconditions: On success, data is list of TokenUsageDataPoint ordered by timestamp ascending
Data points are evenly bucketed: 1h→1min, 6h→5min, 24h→30min, 7d→6h, 30d→1d, all→1d
Each data point's total_tokens === input_tokens + output_tokens
Empty buckets are included with zero values (no gaps in timeline)

structured_side_effects.description: Reads session files to aggregate token usage per time bucket

performance_budget.complexity: O(s) where s = total sessions in time range

functions.name: getAgentTasks
functions.description: Fetch all tasks assigned to a specific agent from SQLite. Located in lib/data/agents.ts.

inputs.name: agent_id
inputs.description: Agent to fetch tasks for.

validators.error_message: Agent ID must be lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens

error_cases.name: agent_not_found
error_cases.condition: Agent ID does not exist in openclaw.json (validated before DB query)

preconditions: agent_id is a valid non-empty branded AgentId string
postconditions: On success, data is list of AgentTask where each task.agent_id === agent_id
Tasks are ordered by priority (critical > high > medium > low), then by created_at descending
Returns empty list (not error) if agent exists but has no tasks

structured_side_effects.description: Validates agent exists before querying tasks
Reads tasks table from SQLite (read-only query via better-sqlite3)

performance_budget.complexity: O(t log t) where t = tasks for this agent

functions.name: getAgentDetail
functions.description: Compose full agent detail by calling getAgentById, getAgentSessions, getAgentTokenUsage, and getAgentTasks. Returns AgentDetail or first encountered error. Located in lib/data/agents.ts.

inputs.name: agent_id
inputs.description: Agent to fetch full detail for.

validators.error_message: Agent ID must be lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens

inputs.name: session_pagination
inputs.description: Pagination for session history.

inputs.name: token_time_range
inputs.description: Time range for token usage chart.

error_cases.name: agent_not_found
error_cases.condition: Agent does not exist in openclaw.json

preconditions: agent_id is a valid non-empty branded AgentId string
postconditions: On success, data is an AgentDetail with all sub-fields populated
agent field matches getAgentById result
recent_sessions matches getAgentSessions result items
token_usage_timeline matches getAgentTokenUsage result
assigned_tasks matches getAgentTasks result
If any sub-query fails, entire call returns the first error (fail-fast)

structured_side_effects.description: Reads agent config
Reads session files for history and token aggregation
Reads tasks from SQLite (read-only)

performance_budget.complexity: O(a + s log s + t log t) where a = agents, s = sessions, t = tasks

functions.name: getAgentActivityEvents
functions.description: Fetch recent activity events for an agent from session data and task history. Used for initial SSR of the activity feed before SSE takes over. Located in lib/data/agents.ts.

inputs.name: agent_id
inputs.description: Agent to fetch events for.

validators.error_message: Agent ID must be lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens

inputs.name: limit
inputs.description: Maximum number of events to return.

error_cases.name: data_error
error_cases.condition: Session files or SQLite query fails

preconditions: agent_id is a valid non-empty branded AgentId string
postconditions: On success, data is list of AgentActivityEvent ordered by timestamp descending
List length <= limit
Each event.agent_id === agent_id

structured_side_effects.description: Reads session files for session start/end events
Reads task history for task-related events (read-only)

performance_budget.complexity: O(e log e) where e = total events before limit

functions.name: handleGetAgents
functions.description: API route handler for GET /api/agents. Calls getAgents(), serializes to AgentListResponse or AgentErrorResponse. Located in app/api/agents/route.ts.
postconditions: Returns HTTP 200 with AgentListResponse on success
Returns HTTP 404 with AgentErrorResponse when openclaw.json not found
Returns HTTP 500 with AgentErrorResponse on parse or DB errors
Response Content-Type is application/json
fetched_at is set to current ISO 8601 timestamp

structured_side_effects.description: Via getAgents() data layer call
Via getAgents() data layer call (read-only)
Returns JSON response to client

functions.name: handleGetAgentById
functions.description: API route handler for GET /api/agents/[agentId]. Validates agentId param with Zod, calls getAgentDetail(), serializes to AgentDetailResponse or AgentErrorResponse. Located in app/api/agents/[agentId]/route.ts.

inputs.name: agent_id
inputs.description: Agent ID from URL path parameter [agentId]. Validated via Zod.

validators.error_message: Agent ID must be lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens

inputs.name: time_range
inputs.description: Optional query param for token usage time range. Validated to TimeRange enum.

inputs.name: sessions_page
inputs.description: Optional query param for session history pagination.

inputs.name: sessions_page_size
inputs.description: Optional query param for sessions per page.

error_cases.name: invalid_agent_id
error_cases.condition: agentId path param fails Zod validation

error_cases.name: agent_not_found
error_cases.condition: No agent with given ID exists

postconditions: Returns HTTP 200 with AgentDetailResponse on success
Returns HTTP 400 with AgentErrorResponse on invalid agentId or query params
Returns HTTP 404 with AgentErrorResponse when agent not found
Returns HTTP 500 with AgentErrorResponse on internal errors
Response Content-Type is application/json

structured_side_effects.description: Via getAgentDetail() data layer call
Via getAgentDetail() data layer call
Via getAgentDetail() data layer call (read-only)
Returns JSON response to client

functions.name: emitAgentSSEEvent
functions.description: Emit an agent-related SSE event to the event bus for distribution to connected clients. Located in lib/sse/agent-events.ts. Called by file watchers when openclaw.json or session files change.

inputs.name: event
inputs.description: The agent event to emit. Must be one of the SSEAgentEvent union variants.

error_cases.name: event_bus_not_initialized
error_cases.condition: SSE event bus has not been started

error_cases.name: serialization_error
error_cases.condition: Event cannot be serialized to JSON

preconditions: event is a valid SSEAgentEvent union member
postconditions: Event is enqueued on the SSE event bus for all subscribed clients
Clients with agent_id filter only receive events matching their filter
Event is serialized as JSON in the SSE data field

structured_side_effects.description: Enqueues event for distribution to connected SSE clients
Logs event emission for observability

invariants: All data access goes through lib/data/ layer — components and API routes never read files or query SQLite directly
All external input (API params, file content) is validated with Zod schemas before use
No `any` types — use `unknown` + type narrowing when type is uncertain (per project standards)
Data functions return Result<T, DataError> — never throw exceptions for expected error conditions
All timestamps are ISO 8601 UTC strings (no Date objects across serialization boundaries)
AgentId is a branded string type — plain strings must be cast through a validation function
openclaw.json parse failures produce graceful error state UI (AC2), never crash the page
Token usage total_tokens always equals input_tokens + output_tokens
Session list is always sorted by started_at descending (newest first)
Tasks are sorted by priority (critical > high > medium > low) then created_at descending
SSE events are namespaced with 'agent:' prefix for the agent domain
API routes return typed JSON with Content-Type: application/json
Client components ('use client') receive serialized data as props — never fetch data themselves on initial render
Server components are the default — 'use client' only for interactivity (charts, SSE subscription, event handlers)
Empty data states (no agents, no sessions, no tasks) are valid success cases, not errors
Malformed individual session files are skipped with a warning log, not treated as fatal errors
requires: lib/openclaw/config - filesystem path resolution for openclaw.json
recharts - LineChart component for token usage visualization
